name: 18_system_b_fails_return_above_arm
description: Branch 3 / System B: current_return strictly above bleed_arm fails the condition; bleed_ticks reset to 0.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 0.0 >= cross 2.0 FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset. System B: current_return -0.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0 (full reset, not decrement). Returns (0, 0, False, False).
